proof: function[T0, T2](x0: Option[T0], x1: T0 -> T2) { Option.none[T0] != x0 or option_map[T0, T2](x0, x1) = Option.none[T2] }[T, U](Option.none[T], f)
function[T0, T3](x0: T0, x1: Option[T0], x2: T0 -> T3) { Option.some[T0](x0) != x1 or option_map[T0, T3](x1, x2) = Option.some[T3](x2(x0)) }[T, U](value, Option.some(value), f)
function[T0, T2](x0: Option[T0], x1: T0 -> Option[T2]) { Option.none[T0] != x0 or option_bind[T0, T2](x0, x1) = Option.none[T2] }[T, U](Option.none[T], f)
function[T0, T3](x0: T0, x1: Option[T0], x2: T0 -> Option[T3]) { Option.some[T0](x0) != x1 or option_bind[T0, T3](x1, x2) = x2(x0) }[T, U](value, Option.some(value), f)
function[T0](x0: Option[T0], x1: T0) { Option.none[T0] != x0 or option_get_or_else[T0](x0, x1) = x1 }[T](Option.none[T], fallback)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: Option[T0], x2: T0) { Option.some[T0](x0) != x1 or option_get_or_else[T0](x1, x2) = x0 }[T](value, Option.some(value), fallback)
